message:
chore(deps): remove frankensearch-lexical from dependency tree

Drop the frankensearch-lexical crate dependency from mcp-agent-mail's
Cargo.lock. This crate is no longer used directly — its functionality
has been consolidated into other frankensearch sub-crates or is handled
by the core/embed/rerank modules that remain in the dependency list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
